is_p_falciparum.evidence: Discusses P. falciparum extensively, but in the context of host genetic susceptibility, not parasite drug-resistance markers.

reports_target_markers.evidence: This is a review of host genetic factors (hemoglobinopathies, HLA, TNF, CD36) and mouse Char loci. No P. falciparum drug-resistance codons (Pfcrt, Pfdhfr, Pfdhps, Pfk13, Pfmdr1, etc.) are reported.

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: No per-locus frequencies of parasite drug-resistance markers are given; it is a narrative review.

sub_country_location.evidence: No parasite marker frequency data tied to any location.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: No collection windows for marker frequency data; this is a review synthesizing prior studies.

african_field_samples.evidence: Discusses African populations for host genetics and uses lab mouse strains for the animal model; no African parasite field isolates with resistance markers.

is_primary_study.evidence: This is a review article ('Susceptibility to malaria as a complex trait') summarizing prior work, not a primary empirical study of drug resistance.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Review article; no primary sample dataset.

supplement.evidence: No relevant marker frequency data would be found in a supplement; the paper is a review of host susceptibility genetics.

assessment.summary: This is a review article on human/mouse genetic susceptibility to malaria (hemoglobin variants, G6PD, HLA, TNF, CD36, and mouse Char resistance loci). It does not report P. falciparum drug-resistance markers or extractable per-locus frequencies, and is not a primary empirical study of parasite drug resistance.
exclusion_reasons: No P. falciparum drug-resistance target markers reported
No extractable per-locus parasite marker frequencies
No sub-country resolution for marker data
No usable collection time for marker data
No African parasite field isolates with resistance markers
